3305790.name: Primland The Magus -Demo Version-
3305790.description:
A dark fantasy 2D action game where you play as Magus, a girl clad in black.

【how to play on keyboard】

  • JUMP Z

  • ATTACK  X

  • MOVE ←→

  • CROUCH↓

  • CHECK  A

  • SPECIAL  S

  • PAUSE  space

  • SELECT Lcrtl

  • L1 Q

  • R1 W

  • L2 E

  • R2 D

  • Message Skip  hold down R2

  • Fullscreen/Window ESC

  • GameMenu  1

【Recommended play order】

【OPENING】→【TUTORIAL】→【CHAPTER I】→【CHAPTER II】

※【CHAPTER I】 allows you to play the entire chapter, including the【CHAPTER I BOSS】.

All content can be distributed on Youtube and other video sites.

・Experience high-quality, gorgeous yet intense pixel-art action! Explore the mesmerizing yet brutal island that features a Metroidvania-style with the help of your diverse array of skills.

・Advance by utilizing a variety of skills that do more than just take down enemies! Intentionally revive foes and use them as a trigger to soar past structures.

・Collect mementos hidden throughout the island to unlock new frame-by-frame animation and passive skills one after another.

・A powerful and emotionally stirring score accompanies the player on their journey, composed by Chroma.

・A dramatic tale revolving around themes of sin and grief, centered on the girl Magus and those around her.
